title: Urban Ladder Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Urban Ladder Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Urban Ladder Advisory Limited:
Urban Ladder Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder Advisory Limited!
